archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) infused with Organic corporate tones

brand_identity.logo: Orange square with white 'S' + bold sans-serif 'SKILLEN' wordmark (the 'i' has an orange dot)

typography.rationale: Cabinet Grotesk delivers authority and a premium EdTech/corporate feel, steering clear of standard Inter/Roboto. Satoshi complements it with exceptional readability for dense course information.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-24). Avoid center-aligned symmetry. Use asymmetry and negative space to direct focus.
layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento Grid Strategy. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. Avoid simple equal columns. Overlap images and text blocks slightly for an editorial look.

ui_components.cards: Cardless or 1px subtle border (#06252C/10) with transparent or #F4F4F4 backgrounds. No heavy drop shadows unless hovered.

buttons.primary: bg-[#F26C21] text-white hover:bg-[#FF6600] rounded-none md:rounded-sm transition-all focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#06252C]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#06252C] text-[#06252C] hover:bg-[#06252C] hover:text-white rounded-none md:rounded-sm transition-all

ui_components.header: Sticky glassmorphism: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#06252C]/10. Must contain main nav, logo, and 'Explore Programs' CTA.
ui_components.forms: Use Shadcn, but customize to remove the generic 'Vercel look'. Sharp corners or 4px max radius. Focus rings must be #F26C21.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons must shift color; cards translate-y by -4px with shadow-lg. Text color MUST be explicitly set on hover.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Use Framer Motion for staggered fade-ups on Bento grids. Stats counters must animate from 0 on scroll. Tracing beam border for the pricing cards.

specific_sections.hero: 3 distinct CTAs (Explore Programs, Hire Talent, Partner). High contrast headline. Real UI context or mosaic of the target audiences instead of vector art.
specific_sections.stats: Animated counters (500+, 100+, 50+, 20+) set in a massive, clean typographic band (bg-[#06252C] text-white).
specific_sections.ecosystem: 3 Audience Cards: Students, Companies, Colleges. Use varied grid spans (e.g., 5-col, 4-col, 3-col).
specific_sections.placement_process: 6-step visual path. Left-aligned steps, connected by an SVG line with a glowing #F26C21 indicator moving down.
specific_sections.mock_interviews: Pricing tier cards. ₹499 and ₹999. The ₹999 card should have the 'Tracing Beam' border effect or a solid #06252C background.
specific_sections.admin_dashboard: Strict, dense 'Control Room' grid. Pure functionality. Shadcn tables for leads, form submissions, and blog management.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing layouts. Only use Shadcn for complex forms, dropdowns, and the Admin Dashboard.
Do NOT use placeholder image URLs. Use the provided media URLs and apply CSS filters (like grayscale or mix-blend-mode) if needed.
Apply strict contrast checks. Text over images must use gradient overlays (bg-black/40) if necessary.
